security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Offline crop planning and grow operations desktop app
bundle.longDescription: GrowOps Planner is an offline-first desktop app for crop planning, growing spaces, tasks, harvest tracking, diagnostics, compatibility checks, and local backups.
